prompt:
You have the Superpowers plugin installed (v5.0.4). The design has been provided below — all decisions are final.

IMPORTANT: Do NOT use the `brainstorming` skill. Do NOT ask clarifying questions. The design is already approved. Go directly to `writing-plans`.

## Task
Build a `bgd` CLI monitoring tool for bg-dispatch. This is a bash script that provides interactive task monitoring commands — similar to slash commands an agent can use to check on background tasks.

## Design (Approved — do not modify)

### Architecture
- `bgd` is a single bash script at the project root (next to `bg-dispatch`)
- It uses subcommand pattern: `bgd <command> [args]`
- Reads task data from `$BG_DISPATCH_DATA_DIR/tasks/*/meta.json`
- Reads progress from `<workdir>/.dev-progress/progress.md`
- Zero dependencies beyond bash, jq, coreutils

### Commands

#### `bgd tasks`
List all tasks in a table format. Sort: running first, then done newest first, then killed.
Status icons: running=🏃, done(exit 0)=✅, done(exit!=0)=⚠️, killed=❌, interrupted=⏸️
Duration: running tasks show elapsed with "..." suffix.
Options: `--status <filter>` (running/done/killed/all), `--limit <n>` (default: 20)
Columns: NAME, STATUS, ADAPTER, DURATION, MODEL, WORKDIR(basename only)

#### `bgd status`
Quick overview: summary counts + current running task detail (name, adapter, elapsed, progress summary, last activity age).

#### `bgd show <task-name-or-id>`
Detailed view: full metadata + progress.md contents + last 10 git log --oneline from workdir.
Match by task_name (partial OK) or task_id. Multiple matches → most recent.

#### `bgd logs <task-name-or-id>`
Default: last 50 lines of output.txt, ANSI stripped.
Flags: `--watchdog` (watchdog.log), `-n <lines>`, `-f` (follow/tail -f)

#### `bgd clean`
Remove done/killed tasks older than 24h. `--all` removes all done/killed. `--dry-run` preview.
NEVER touch running tasks. Kill orphan processes. Report summary.

#### `bgd progress <task-name-or-id>`
Show .dev-progress/progress.md from workdir. If running: also elapsed + last file change.

#### `bgd cancel <task-name-or-id>`
Kill process tree, update meta (killed/user_cancelled), update task-spec (cancelled), remove lock, dispatch notifications.

#### `bgd resume <task-name-or-id>`
Find interrupted/stalled/killed task, read adapter from meta, call `bg-dispatch --adapter <adapter> --workdir <workdir> --resume --force`.

#### `bgd help`
All commands with descriptions.

### Helper Functions
- `_find_task()` — find task dir by name/id (partial match, most recent)
- `_calc_duration()` — human-readable duration
- `_strip_ansi()` — remove ANSI escapes
- `_get_progress_summary()` — one-line progress extract from progress.md

## Context
- Project root: /home/node/.openclaw/workspace-main/projects/bg-dispatch
- Data format: data/tasks/<task-id>/meta.json (see bg-dispatch script for schema)
- Progress: <workdir>/.dev-progress/progress.md
- bgd must work standalone (bash + jq only, no npm)

## After completing bgd script:
1. Update SKILL.md — add Monitoring Commands section documenting all bgd commands with examples
2. Update README.md — add CLI Monitoring section
3. Update install.sh — chmod +x bgd, add PATH suggestion

## Methodology
1. Use `writing-plans` to create a plan. Save to docs/superpowers/plans/.
2. Plan review will auto-run. Fix issues.
3. Use `executing-plans` to execute.
4. Commit after EACH task.
5. `chmod +x bgd` and verify with mock data before done.
6. `verification-before-completion`.

## Testing (MANDATORY)
1. Create temp test fixtures with mock meta.json files (running, done exit 0, done exit 1, killed, various ages)
2. Set BG_DISPATCH_DATA_DIR to fixture dir, run each bgd command
3. Verify output formatting, status icons, duration calc, table alignment
4. Test: no tasks, partial name match, no match, --help
5. Clean up fixtures after tests

## Feature List Tracking (MANDATORY)
Update feature-list.md after each feature: 🔴 → 🟡 → 🟢.

## Code Quality Rules
- `set -euo pipefail` at top
- All variables quoted
- Use `local` in functions
- No eval, no magic numbers
- All user-facing text: English (this is an open-source project)

## Git Discipline (MANDATORY)
- `git checkout develop && git pull && git checkout -b feature/bgd-cli`
- Commit after each task
- Push: `git push -u origin feature/bgd-cli --force-with-lease`
